zh-CN.name: 字母H
zh-CN.intro: 字母H是英语字母表中的第八个字母。它看起来像一座小梯子，可以爬高高。H是一个很有用的字母哦！

story.title: 🏠 字母H的故事
story.body: 字母H长得像一座小房子，有两根柱子，中间有一根横梁。小猴子爬上去，嘣嘣跳跳，好开心。H还像一架小梯子，小猫咪顺着梯子爬上屋顶看星星。H最喜欢和a, e, i, o, u这些元音字母做朋友，它们一起能发好多音，比如ha, he, hi, ho, hu。H也喜欢站在单词的开头，像hello, happy, home，让说话变得温暖。所以，记住字母H，它像小房子，也像小梯子，带给我们快乐和家。

knowledge.title: 字母H的发音
knowledge.body: 字母H通常发/h/的声音，就像轻轻哈气。在中文里我们念“āi chǐ”。它出现在很多英文单词中，是重要的辅音字母。

en.name: H
en.intro: H is the eighth letter of the alphabet. It looks like a little ladder. H is a very useful letter!

story.title: 🏠 Story of Letter H
story.body: Letter H looks like a little house with two pillars and a beam in the middle. A little monkey climbs on it, jumping and hopping happily. H also looks like a small ladder; a kitten climbs up to the roof to watch the stars. H loves to make friends with vowel letters a, e, i, o, u. Together they can make fun sounds: ha, he, hi, ho, hu. H often stands at the beginning of words like hello, happy, home, bringing warmth to our speech. So remember letter H, it's like a little house and a ladder, bringing us joy and home.

knowledge.title: How to Pronounce H
knowledge.body: Letter H usually makes the /h/ sound, like a gentle breath. It appears in many English words and is an important consonant.
